name: Chicken Cacciateri
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown chicken pieces thoroughly in hot oil in a large skillet or Dutch oven.
2. Remove the chicken and set aside.
3. Add onion and garlic to the oil and cook until the onion is translucent.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients.
5. Arrange the chicken pieces in the sauce; cover and simmer for 45 minutes, or until the chicken is tender.
6. Discard the bay leaves and skim off any excess fat.
7. Serve the chicken and sauce over a bed of cooked spaghetti or noodles.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
